nl_query: Show Faculty who are assigned less than 10 answer scripts for any and all kinds of evaluation
failed_sql:
SELECT fc.employee_id, fc.name, COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) AS script_count
FROM   faculty_cache fc
JOIN   script_assignment sa ON sa.evaluator_id = fc.employee_id
JOIN   answer_script a ON a.script_id = sa.script_id
WHERE  sa.is_active = TRUE
GROUP  BY fc.employee_id, fc.name
HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT a.id) < 10
ORDER  BY script_count ASC
error:
Execution error: server closed the connection unexpectedly
	This probably means the server terminated abnormally
	before or while processing the request.
